name: 替身婚姻（嫁給不愛自己的人）
name_en: Substitute Marriage (Married to Someone Who Loves Another)
description: Michelle是Ruth的替代品，Richard因為Michelle長得像Ruth才娶她。這種關係的核心痛點是「你愛的不是我，而是我像的那個人」，極度虐心。

examples.drama_title: Reel Revenge: Divorced Director Strikes Back | Watch the full episode on the ShortMax app
examples.excerpt: He married you cuz you look like Ruth. ... He's loved you guys since you guys were kids. If Ruth hadn't married her older brother, he would never even looked at you. ... So that's why we've been married all these years.
examples.context: Michelle是Ruth的替代品，Richard因為Michelle長得像Ruth才娶她。這種關係的核心痛點是「你愛的不是我，而是我像的那個人」，極度虐心。
